changes: Added battalionId as a required field in equipment creation for all users including admins (line 220: added 'battalionId' to hasAll() check)
Added battalionId string validation on equipment creation: must be non-empty string (lines 227-228)
Updated create rule logic: admins can create equipment in any battalion, leaders must create in their own battalion only (line 229)
Updated comment to reflect CRITICAL requirement: battalionId is now mandatory on create for ALL users (line 217)
Preserved admin read access: admins can read all equipment across all battalions without battalion restrictions (line 213)
Preserved admin update access: admins can update any equipment fields in any battalion (lines 234-239)
Preserved admin delete access: only admins can delete any equipment in the system (line 242)
